title: YouTube Poop: Mr. Volcano's "Doing"
description:
Wherein The King shows his complete disdain for Duke Onkeled almost immediately, and stuff happens in the meantime.

The title stems from the fact that Alan sounds kinda like he's saying "I want your doing Mr. Volcano."

Yeah.

Clips Used, In Order Of Appearance:

- Lazytown
- Wand Of Gamelon
- Sonic The Hedgehog
- Power Rangers
- Hotel Mario
- Bill O'Reilly
- Super Mario Brothers 3 Cartoon
- Josh & Taylor
- Volvic Advert
